title: Passé composé vs imparfait: event and background
subtitle: Tell a tiny story without mixing the past tenses blindly.
duolingoBridge: This is one of the main bridges from A1 into A2 narrative ability.
overview: Knowledge point 1: passé composé = main event.
Knowledge point 2: imparfait = background, description, habit.

items.fr: Il faisait beau, alors je suis sorti.
items.en: The weather was nice, so I went out.
items.es: Hacía buen tiempo, así que salí.

items.en: I was tired, but I worked.

items.fr: Il y avait beaucoup de monde, donc j’ai attendu.
items.en: There were many people, so I waited.
items.es: Había mucha gente, así que esperé.

items.fr: Quand je suis arrivé, Marie était déjà là.
items.en: When I arrived, Marie was already there.
items.es: Cuando llegué, Marie ya estaba allí.

items.fr: Je lisais quand tu as appelé.
items.en: I was reading when you called.
